parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 1024, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are writing a short, friendly cold outreach email for Bhavik, a data scientist and AI engineer in New York (GDG NYC lead, instructor, speaker).

Lead Info:
- Name: ' + $json.Name + '
- Title: ' + $json.Title + '
- Company: ' + $json.Company + '

Base email template to adapt (written by Bhavik):
' + $json.templateContent + '

Instructions:
1. Use the base template above as your starting point
2. Replace any [Name] placeholder with the lead actual first name
3. Replace any [Company] placeholder with the company name
4. Keep the tone Friendly and Concise - short paragraphs, no fluff
5. Do NOT invent facts about the person or company
6. Only personalize using the Name, Company, and Title provided above
7. Keep the sign-off exactly as written in the template
8. IMPORTANT: Do NOT break lines mid-sentence. Each paragraph must be one continuous line of text with no line breaks inside it.
9. Separate paragraphs with a blank line (double newline).
10. Return ONLY valid JSON with no markdown or code fences:
{"subject": "...", "body": "..."}' }] }) }}
